title: ADHD Combined Presentation
content: Inattention: 6+ symptoms (fails to give close attention, difficulty sustaining attention, does not seem to listen, fails to follow instructions, difficulty organizing, avoids sustained mental effort, loses things, distracted, forgetful). Hyperactivity/Impulsivity: 6+ symptoms (fidgets, leaves seat, runs/climbs, unable to play quietly, 'on the go', talks excessively, blurts out answers, difficulty waiting turn, interrupts).
